title: Dark Personality Pattern Check
promise: Non-clinical dark-pattern screen for manipulation, entitlement, empathy, and impulse-control risks.
audience: Individuals, founders, teams, coaches, and facilitators using reflective self-knowledge tools
description: Reflective pattern check across Transparent Influence, Status Humility, Empathy Under Pressure, Impulse & Boundary Control. Higher scores mean stronger protective behaviour against dark-pattern risk. Four-dimensional radar result, balanced index, level label, strongest protective archetype, and weakest-area reflection action.
ogTitle: Dark Personality Pattern Check - Outfinity Quiz
ogDescription: Non-clinical dark-pattern screen for manipulation, entitlement, empathy, and impulse-control risks.
